authors.author: Randy Thomas
Sam Oliver Scott
Ich will dich preisen, Herr, vielmehr als bisher

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love You, my Lord, with all of my heart. You are my everything, You're the reason I sing. I love You, I love You, My Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love you, My Bride For you're in my heart Before the world ever began You were in my great plan I love you, I love you My Bride
